title: centaurea caroli-henrici
intro: Centaurea caroli-henrici, also known as the Scabiosa caroli-henrici, is a perennial plant species within the family Dipsacaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea caroli-henrici include the reduction of inflammation and relief from pain, as well as its potential to aid in the healing of wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the flowers, leaves, or roots, and are often used in traditional medicine.
